title: Hexadecimal literal vs decimal literal
key_bug_features: Hexadecimal literal exceeding decimal literal limits
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_hex_decimal (id INT PRIMARY KEY, hex_value BIGINT, decimal_value BIGINT);
INSERT INTO test_hex_decimal (id, hex_value, decimal_value) VALUES (1, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF, 18446744073709551615);
INSERT INTO test_hex_decimal (id, hex_value, decimal_value) VALUES (2, 0x10000000000000000, 18446744073709551616);
SELECT id, hex_value, decimal_value FROM test_hex_decimal WHERE hex_value > decimal_value;
SELECT * FROM test_hex_decimal WHERE decimal_value IS NULL;
